The Airdrop will be over in 1d 02h

This airdrop is only available to the most active members.

Monad presents a significant opportunity for early participants in its ecosystem. Tokens are not just for development purposes and have real value.

Community member? Get more testnet tokens!

Members must have the "Full Access" role to qualify.

Note: If you're having trouble with the faucet, check your existing EVM addresses - there might be something there! 👀
